name: TrustOS Forensic AI Research
patterns: Synthetic Content Firewall — 4-layer AI/vendor noise filter before any signal is treated as buying intent
ICP_MEMO output format — trigger event + bleeding neck verbatim + silent objection + green light outcome + insider vocabulary + competitor complaint map
3-hook subject line formula: money saved ($X leak) / time saved (X minutes) / exclusivity (I found the pattern)
Evidence table requirement — every claim must trace to verbatim quote + source type, or it gets deleted
Phase 2 source triangulation: 1-3 star reviews only on G2/Capterra, Reddit/HN/LinkedIn complaint threads — ignore all positive sources
Blue ocean gap identification: what market leaders are ignoring = uncontested positioning
Silent objection framing: the reason they ghost is never what they say it is — name it before they think it
notes: TrustOS sells a 'strategy call' after giving away the prompt framework. Their moat is the ICP_MEMO as a dependency doc consumed by 15+ downstream guides. Competitor is anyone doing generic ICP worksheets. Their blue ocean: evidence-first research that filters AI pollution. Nebula's overlap: we do trigger-based ICP but our ICP.md was thin. This framework makes it forensic. Their weakness: still gates on a call (Cal.com CTA everywhere). Nebula beats it by being fully self-serve.
actions_taken: Wrote ICP_MEMO.md to growth_system/ using full 4-phase forensic method against Nebula ICP
Added passes_content_firewall() function to linkedin_post_monitor.py — filters AI/vendor comments before lead scoring
Added icp_memo_subject_lines block to cold_email_frameworks.json: 3-hook formula + silent objection pre-empt template

steal: 3-prompt offer audit: Diagnostics (cynical buyer gap analysis) → Architect (value equation restructure) → Ontology (AI-parseable context block). Output = [OFFER_MEMO] that feeds all downstream content, outreach, email.
framework: Grand Slam Value Equation: Dream Outcome × Perceived Likelihood / Time Delay × Effort
weakness: requires manual prompt runs + Cal.com call to get theirs built. Nebula: entire audit+fix self-serve, no call.
nebula_moat: OFFER_MEMO already produced (internal run) and wired into cold_email_frameworks.json. Dollar leak surfaced inline in audit result. No call gate.

steal: 3-prompt lead magnet system: Bridge Asset Strategist → Persuasion Architect → Ghostwriter Loop. Consumes ICP_MEMO+OFFER_MEMO, produces [LEAD_MAGNET] that distributes via LinkedIn, email, outreach DMs. Key insight: 'hidden VSL' — educational content structured as a sales argument without feeling like one. Voice recording step extracts expertise AI cannot invent.
our_execution: Skipped voice recording. Used ICP_MEMO Reddit verbatims as source material (superior to voice note). Produced full 3,500w Bridge Asset: 5-chapter self-diagnostic. Title: The ROAS Cliff: Why your CTR looks fine and your page converts nobody. Saved: growth_system/bridge_asset.md
weakness: All 3 prompts require manual runs in separate chat. No integration. Distribution is 3 more separate guides. Nebula: bridge asset is the audit itself — self-executing, inline, 60 seconds.
distribution_plan: LinkedIn post (comment-gate), cold outreach value-drop, email sequence opener

steals.linkedin: 2-post-type system: Steal This (transactional tool) vs Outcome Breakdown (methodology). Comment-gate = algorithm alignment + quality filter + data capture. Keyword: 1 word. Blank connection request beats personalized note (ambiguity > instant categorization).
steals.outreach: Anti-Sales Outreach Generator: Value Drop (share resource, no permission) + Curiosity Question (binary either/or framing). Breathe period: 4-5 days post-connection. Max 2 messages total. Zero pitching.
steals.email: Evergreen Email Architect: 20-email micro-dose loop, 1/week. Hook + Micro-Dose + Bridge + P.S. only. P.S. is the ONLY place the offer lives. Loops back to email 1 after week 20 (5-month gap = fresh every cycle). Ego protection protocol: never accuse reader, frame as market pattern or third-party.

our_execution: Produced all 3: 2 LinkedIn posts (comment-gate, keyword ROAS + AUDIT), 3 DM scripts (value drop + curiosity Q + nudges), 20-email evergreen sequence. Saved: distribution_assets.md
